meaning: 一种压缩文件格式;n.出租马车,出租汽车,计程车,(机车,卡车,起重机的)司机室,驾驶室vi.乘出租马车
examples: We'll take a cab to save time.
The cab drew up outside the house.
Could I use your phone to call a cab?
To operate a yellow cab and solicit passengers on the street you need a medallion.
After a few drinks, the couple got married at a drive-through chapel in a cab.
